subject: English
title: Fear No More – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The poem 'Fear No More' is written by William Shakespeare
It appears in the play Cymbeline
The poem explains that death frees people from life's hardships
It shows that rich and poor are equal in death
Death is presented as peaceful rest
characters: The deceased person – The person being mourned
Golden lads and girls – Rich and privileged people
themes: Equality of all humans in death
literary_devices: Repetition – 'Fear no more' emphasizes the main idea
Imagery – Natural elements like sun, winter, lightning and thunder
exam_tips: Remember that the poem comes from Shakespeare’s play Cymbeline
Focus on the idea that death ends suffering
Mention the comparison between rich and poor to explain equality in death
